etymology.description: 一 (one) + 冓 (basket repeatedly woven) -> signifies the concept of repeating something -> again
etymology.interpretation: The character 再 (zài, 'again; once more') symbolizes the concept of repetition through its components. 一 (one) combined with 冓 (representing a shape of a basket repeatedly woven) creates an image of doing something one more time, emphasizing the notion of 'again' or repetition.

examples.chinese: 请再给我一次机会(請再給我一次機會)。
examples.pinyin: Qǐng zài gěi wǒ yī cì jīhuì.

examples.chinese: 他决定再试一次(他決定再試一次)。
examples.pinyin: Tā juédìng zài shì yī cì.
examples.english: He decided to try once more.

examples.chinese: 如果你不懂(如果你不懂)，我可以再解释一遍(我可以再解釋一遍)。
examples.pinyin: Rúguǒ nǐ bù dǒng, wǒ kěyǐ zài jiěshì yī biàn.
examples.english: If you don't understand, I can explain it again.
